title: Fluffy Pink Monster Large Round Yellow Eyes
sourceTitle: Fluffy Pink Monster Large Round Yellow Eyes
prompt: A fluffy pink monster with large, round, yellow eyes and a wide, toothy grin is the central focus of the image. It has black, curved horns and tufts of pink fur sticking out. Its hands are clasped together in front of its chest, and its large, furry body is supported by two thick legs with clawed feet. Scattered around the monster are small, colorful hearts and stars, adding a whimsical touch to the composition. The background is plain white, emphasizing the character and its playful elements. --ar 5:6 --sref 172579590 --v 8.1 --stylize 350
